conditions.text: C1: gitleaks prose lane always passes explicit -c; in-tree .gitleaks.toml/.gitleaksignore under change dir is a refusal
C2: gitleaks requiredness parity — prose lane refuses when config declares gitleaks required and it is unavailable
C3: scan_change_prose fail-closed — only NotFound skips; non-UTF-8 in an artifact is a refusal
C4: prose lane runs before capture/reopen/receipt-eval at all 5 sites incl Test --reuse; smuggling e2e covers Test reuse
C5: D6 digest from the same validated byte buffer; archive mismatch always fatal; absent-digest warning names phase+file
C6: prune_change_process_artifacts errors on symlink/dir/special at an artifact path; inventory fails closed on a present artifact
C7: D5b evaluates both sides of rename entries; malformed/unreadable ledger blocks; only archive-staging commits affected
C8: schema-boundary tests — CANDIDATE_SCHEMA==2 pinned; v1 origin under new binary never reuses (Build+Test)
C9: change_process_artifact_paths single source of truth (source_digest+candidate+scan lane); pins 11 names; active-only exclusion
C10: commit-floor e2e — secret in design.md and test.md each caught by scan_staged_postimages via pre-commit

reconciliations.reason: Scope-expansion rewind: the Builder's implementation required one-line GateRecord literal additions to local_validation.rs and stats.rs (mechanical fallout from the new non-Default ledger field); adding them to the manifest rewound to Architecture and consumed review attempts. Re-affirming the unchanged Security(plan) verdict on the benign 2-file expansion.

Removed two leftover HTML template comments from proposal.md and tasks.md that the archive validator flagged as unfilled placeholders; no code, design, or test change. Re-driving mechanically over byte-identical code.

Mechanical re-drive after stripping two HTML template comments from proposal.md/tasks.md (archive-validator placeholders); no code/design/test change; Security(plan) verdict and its 10 conditions already verified at the passing Security(code).
Mechanical re-drive after stripping two HTML template comments from proposal.md/tasks.md; code/tests byte-identical to the prior green Build/Security-code/Test.
